title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.527 - Circuit No. 29, number of judges, divisions — when judges elected
text:
478.527.  Circuit No. 29, number of judges, divisions — when judges elected. — 1.  There shall be three circuit judges in the twenty-ninth judicial circuit consisting of the county of Jasper.  These judges shall sit in divisions numbered one, two and three.
  2.  The circuit judge of division two shall be elected in 1980.  The circuit judges of divisions one and three shall be elected in 1982.
(L. 1901 p. 120 § 1, A.L. 1959 S.B. 96, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
